title: juncus planifolius
intro: Juncus planifolius, also known as the flat-leaved rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juncus planifolius include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. Juncus planifolius can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and has also been used in poultices and salves to treat skin irritations and wounds.
